LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CRAB ADDISON., D/B/A JOE'S CRAB SHACK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON AUGUST 5, 2014. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 (302/MJM)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CRAB ADDISON D/B/A JOE'S CRAB SHACK'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, AND MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE SUBSTANTIVE WRITTEN RESPONSES WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, WITH NO OBJECTIONS, OBJECTIONS HAVING BEEN WAIVED BY THE FAILURE TO TIMELY RESPOND. MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF ARE ORDERED IN THE REQUESTED AMOUNT OF $879.20 FOR FEES AND COSTS INCURRED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Arbitration Award Filed

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Motion For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Amy Lambert, Esq. of Muro & Lampe, Tel. 916.817.6300, for defendant and moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CRAB ADDISON D/B/A JOE'S CRAB SHACK's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Motion For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to provide substantive written responses within two weeks of the date of this order, with no objections, objections having been waived by the failure to timely respond. Monetary sanctions against plaintiff are ordered in the requested amount of $879.20 for fees and costs incurred. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
